title: Neosasamorpha macrospila
taxonomy: Neosasamorpha macrospila is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to Japan and is an alpine plant that grows in high-altitude mountainous regions. The classification of Neosasamorpha macrospila can be broken down into its taxonomic ranks: kingdom, genus, species. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the genus Neosasamorpha. Further research is needed to determine the plant's exact classification within the Gentianaceae family.
